title: Product Design Team Lead
description:
Role Overview

We are looking for a highly experienced Product Design Team Lead to lead, review, and elevate the work of our UX/UI and ProductDesigners. This role is both hands-on and leadership-focused: you willmanage and mentor designers while also contributing directly to design work onkey initiatives.

The core responsibility of this role is to ensure thatour products are extremely easy to use, deeply logical, globally scalableand world-class in execution. You will partner closely with ProductManagers, Developers, and Business Stakeholders to take products from earlyconcept through to final delivery, ensuring clarity, consistency, and qualityat every stage.

Our products include mobile and web applicationsused globally by millions of users, primarily in B2B environments,with some B2C products as well.

Key Responsibilities

Design Leadership & TeamManagement

  • Lead, manage, and mentor a team of UX/UI and Product Designers.
  • Review design work across the team to ensure high standards of usability, logic, consistency, and visual quality.
  • Provide clear, constructive feedback and guidance to help designers grow their skills and thinking.
  • Set and uphold design principles, patterns, and best practices across all products.

Hands-On Design Contribution

  • Actively contribute to design work on complex or high-impact projects.
  • Create and refine user flows, wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups.
  • Ensure designs are not only visually polished but also intuitive, scalable, and practical to build.

End-to-End Product Design Ownership

  • Work closely with Product Managers to fully understand business goals, user needs, and constraints.
  • Proactively question, clarify, and challenge requirements that are unclear, misleading, incomplete, or contradictory.
  • Help the product team think through edge cases, workflows, and real-world usage scenarios that may have been overlooked.
  • Translate business and technical requirements into clear, logical, and user-friendly design solutions that are scalable and link fully throughout the platform.

Cross-Functional Collaboration

  • Partner closely with Developers to ensure designs are feasible, well-documented, and implemented accurately.
  • Collaborate with Business and Stakeholders to align on priorities, timelines, and outcomes.
  • Act as a bridge between design, product, and engineering to ensure shared understanding and smooth execution.

Quality & Consistency

  • Ensure design outputs meet a “world-class” standard across all platforms and products.
  • Maintain consistency across mobile and web applications while adapting appropriately for different contexts and user types.
  • Advocate for simplicity, clarity, and usability in all design decisions.

Requirements

Experience & Skills

  • Ability to think logically and systematically about complex workflows and user journeys.
  • Ability to understand broader use cases for features and design them in a scalable way across different user types, while ensuring they connect logically to other parts of the platform to create a cohesive and intuitive user experience
  • Proven experience leading or managing a product design or UX/UI team, mobile & web design is a plus
  • Experience designing software used at scale, ideally with global users.
  • Solid experience working on B2B products, with exposure to B2C is a plus.

Collaboration & Communication

  • Excellent ability to communicate design rationale clearly to designers, developers, and non-design stakeholders.
  • Comfortable challenging assumptions and asking the right questions to uncover gaps or risks early.
  • Strong collaboration skills and experience working in cross-functional product teams.

Mindset & Approach

  • Highly detail-oriented, with a strong bias toward clarity and simplicity.
  • Pragmatic and solution-focused, balancing ideal user experience with real-world constraints.
  • High standards for quality, but able to move fast and iterate when needed.
  • Passionate about building products that feel effortless to use.

postedCompany.description:
Karooooo Management Company Pte Ltd is a leading global provider of data analytic solutions for mobile asset management, asset recovery and workforce optimisation based on a proven Software-as-a-Service platform. Fleet management, Stolen Vehicle Recovery and insurance telematics services remain its core business, with a focus on technology development to enhance customer experience. The company is a service-centric organisation focusing on the in-house design, development and installation of telematics technology and data analytics.

Karooooo Management Company Pte Ltd technology is widely accepted by motor manufacturers and insurers. Its customer telematics web interface provides a comprehensive set of features ensuring the optimisation of both fleet and human resources. As an expansion of its integrated service offering, Karooooo also provides driver risk assessment offerings in the insurance telematics field.
postedCompany.name: KAROOOOO MANAGEMENT COMPANY PTE. LTD.
